title: JSON Array of Objects
description: JSON array where each element is an object with key-value fields
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a JSON array in which every element is a JSON object with key-value fields. This is the typical shape of tabular data or collections of structured records serialised as JSON.

## When to use
Use `media:json;list;record;textable` when a node produces or consumes a homogeneous array of objects — for example a list of search results, database rows, or structured log entries. For a simple array of mixed values, use [JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/media:json;textable;list).

## Notes
Consumers may assume all elements share the same field names, but should handle missing or null fields gracefully. The `textable` tag allows this type to flow to any generic text consumer.
